description:
Verify ollama is serving nomic-embed-text (ollama pull nomic-embed-text if missing), then python3 scripts/embed_corpus.py --resume --text transcendental-magic-doctrine and --text transcendental-magic-ritual. --resume so existing embeddings are untouched; never --reindex here.

Done: chunk_embeddings has all 219 new rows at 768 dims; pre-existing embedding count unchanged (record before/after counts in close note); corpus_metadata.embedding_model unchanged (still the pinned nomic tag).
